name: Clockwork Dawn
short_description: A new dawn approaches with the advent of intricate mechanical designs that will transform the world into an era of steam and steel. Take control of a country in this alternate history steampunk timeline and either survive and prosper or be forgotten in the dust of ages past.
detailed_description:
The world stands on the precipice of a revolution that will transform the landscape of the old world into a new realm of steel and smoky skies. Take control of a nation and guide it through this transformative time, embrace new technologies, and fight to survive and thrive.

Choose Your Nation

Play as one of 100 countries spanning 1306 provinces, each with unique starting situations from population and economics to diplomatic relations. You will need to forge alliances, build your army, and stabilize your country in order to overcome other adversaries.

Grow Your Realm

Help your people prosper by ensuring a stable flow of resources through domestic projects, buildings, and overseas expeditions. Conduct research on over 70 technologies inspired by the 19th and 20th centuries to unlock additional advancements.

Compete for Global Dominance

Fight either at home or abroad among overseas areas to secure resources flowing to your country. Send armies overseas to capture territory or fortify your existing nation, improve your domain through development, and more.

Clockwork Dawn is still early in development. Some features may be removed, changed, or added.
